title: Results
description: Presenting the data, outcomes, and conclusions from our experiments.

sections.text: Our experimental data demonstrates a clear dose-dependent response of the promoter to lead ion concentration. At 50 µM lead, we observed a 10-fold increase in reporter gene expression compared to the control group. The results validate the functionality of our core sensing part.

sections.alt: A graph showing fluorescence vs. lead concentration.
